Description.value: Re-prices ammo across vanilla / EFTX / IZY / SCG to mirror real-world caliber market hierarchy. 9mm cheap baseline, .308/.50AE premium, .50BMG specialty. Overall ~1.5-2x ammo price uplift to make 'shoot or save' a real decision before sortie. Trader buy and sell both shift; loot crate value rises in tandem. v0.1 covers ammo only; gun re-pricing planned for v0.2.
